caption: Kambar offers his Ramayanam before Narasimha at Srirangam
scene: Kambar offering his palm-leaf manuscript before a radiant Narasimha, amid the Srivaishnava assembly, with Ranganatha reclining in the sannidhi. All wear thirunāmam (Vaishnava).
prompt: Kambar offering his Ramayanam manuscript before a radiant Narasimha at Srirangam, a Srivaishnava assembly seated around, Ranganatha reclining in the sannidhi.
